summary: Backend testing of event_type resolution bug fix completed. All 13 tests pass. The fix correctly resolves event_type from: 1) Explicit frontend event_type field in MessageCreate model, 2) DB lookup of short URL's link_type from short_urls collection, 3) Keyword-based fallback detection. The OLD BUG (all /api/s/ URLs becoming congrats_card_sent) is FIXED.

explicit_event_type_digital_card_sent.details: POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} with event_type='digital_card_sent' correctly logs digital_card_sent in contact_events

explicit_event_type_review_request_sent.details: POST /api/messages/send/{user_id} with event_type='review_request_sent' correctly logs review_request_sent

db_lookup_business_card_short_url.details: Message with business_card short URL (no explicit event_type) correctly resolves to digital_card_sent via DB lookup

db_lookup_review_request_short_url.details: Message with review_request short URL (no explicit event_type) correctly resolves to review_request_sent via DB lookup

keyword_detection_congrats.details: Message with 'congrats' keyword (no short URL) correctly resolves to congrats_card_sent

default_personal_sms.details: Regular message without special content correctly resolves to personal_sms

pydantic_endpoint_event_type.details: POST /api/messages/send/{user_id}/{conversation_id} (Pydantic endpoint) correctly uses explicit event_type

short_url_create_stores_link_type.details: POST /api/s/create correctly stores link_type in short_urls collection

seed_data_creation: Created test short URLs with link_types: business_card, review_request, congrats_card, showcase
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event_type resolution bug is fixed. The backend now: 1) Uses explicit event_type from frontend if provided via MessageCreate.event_type field, 2) Looks up short URL's link_type from short_urls collection to resolve event_type if no explicit type, 3) Falls back to keyword detection for non-short-URL content. The _LINK_TYPE_TO_EVENT mapping in messages.py maps link_type to event_type (e.g., business_card -> digital_card_sent).

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sends are logged but not actually delivered
